title: Synthesia’s AI training platform is moving beyond videos into live coaching
summary: As with Synthesia’s main product, customers can either create their own training programs on the platform or enlist the help of Synthesia’s consultants to build a bespoke solution that relies in part on whatever training documents and context the company already has.
